description: Style NoteFeel like you never want to get out of bed with this dreamy and indulgent nightdress from enamor. Delicate lace trims and cross-over straps at the back increase the style quotient of this piece while its blended composition ensures total comfort.Product DetailsTeal empire line flared night-dress, lace overlay in front, gathers with crossover straps at the back, cascade at back, tapering hemlineMaterial and CareLace-92% nylon 8% spandex and Body-85% nylon 15% spandexHand wash warm with like coloursSize and FitRegular fit The model(height 5'8"and chest 33") is wearing a size M
